sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking green right U-shape
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check small colored items
small_items = [n for n in seg if n['color'] in ['Y', 'N', 'O', 'S'] and n['pixels'] <= 10]
print("Small colored items:")
for s in small_items:
    print(f"  color={s['color']} pixels={s['pixels']} boundary={s['boundary']}")

# Check red dots
reds = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'r']
print(f"\nRed dots: {len(reds)}")
for r in reds:
    print(f"  boundary={r['boundary']}")

# Show cluster area
print("\n=== Cluster area ===")
for r in range(35, 43):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][8:22]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
